list.value: echo "=PASSWD="; cat /etc/passwd | grep -v nologin | grep -v false; echo "=SUDOERS="; cat /etc/sudoers 2>/dev/null; ls /etc/sudoers.d/ 2>/dev/null; echo "=SUDO_L="; sudo -l 2>/dev/null; echo "=SAMBA_CONF="; cat /etc/samba/smb.conf 2>/dev/null | head -50; echo "=SSSD="; cat /etc/sssd/sssd.conf 2>/dev/null; echo "=KRB_TICKETS="; ls -la /tmp/*.ccache /tmp/krb5* 2>/dev/null; klist 2>/dev/null; echo "=SAMBA_PRIVATE="; ls -la /var/lib/samba/private/ 2>/dev/null; echo "=SAMBA_USERS="; pdbedit -L 2>/dev/null; samba-tool user list 2>/dev/null; echo "=PROCESSES="; ps aux | grep -v "\[" | head -30; echo "=SHADOW_READABLE="; ls -la /etc/shadow 2>/dev/null; echo "=ANNE_FILES="; find /home/anne -readable 2>/dev/null; echo "=ID="; id; echo "=GROUPS="; groups
